case_title: MEGAWINE, INC VS. CHU CHUS GOODS, INC. DBA HARVEST HILLS MARKET

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,290.36 FILED BY MEGAWINE, INC AS TO DEFENDANT CHU CHUS GOODS, INC. DBA HARVEST HILLS MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
